name: Sauteed Zucchini with Lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim ends off zucchini and cut into 1/8 inch slices.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add zucchini, salt, and pepper. Cook, shaking and tossing until it starts to take color.
4. Add red pepper flakes and lemon juice; cover the skillet.
5. Cook for about 2 more minutes. Do not overcook.
6. Serve sprinkled with parsley flakes.
